attacking_style: Explosive attacks in final kilometer on steep gradients (15-20%), particularly effective on punchy climbs. Also capable of long-range moves (60km+) when targeting stage wins, demonstrating tactical flexibility beyond pure finishing power.
team_tactics: Relies on Jumbo-Visma setting sustained tempo to isolate rivals before launching attacks. Often rides alone in final kilometers even when isolated, prioritizing bonus seconds aggressively. Team shows willingness to split resources or sacrifice positioning when confident in his TT ability.
terrain_preference: Dominates mountain time trials and explosive steep finishes (18-20% gradients). Vulnerable on technical descents where conservative cornering costs 20-25 seconds. Flat TTs show mixed results against pure specialists like Evenepoel.
vulnerability: Technical descents expose overcautious approach. Crashes plague his grand tour campaigns (2019 Vuelta twice in one stage, 2021 Tour, 2022 Vuelta withdrawal). Long sustained climbs under repeated accelerations show occasional cracking (lost 1:12 to Evenepoel, gapped 30s at 2023 Giro).
key_patterns: Aggressively hunts bonus seconds even when controlling GC, prioritizing marginal gains over energy conservation (5+ instances)
Peaks perfectly for final week mountain stages and closing ITTs to overturn deficits (2021/2023 Vuelta, 2023 Giro)
Conservative descending technique consistently costs 20-36 seconds versus aggressive rivals on technical corners (3 observations)
Willing to attack teammates when form peaks, shown twice at 2023 Vuelta despite Kuss in red
Superior recovery within stages allows sprint wins after hard climbs, repeatedly outsprinting climbers (4+ instances)
Mountain TT specialist: won Giro overturning 26s deficit, sealed three Vueltas with final ITT dominance
form_trajectory: neutral: Strong 2023 Giro victory via mountain TT, excellent Vuelta form but team politics complicated. Lombardia podium suggests consistent top-level but not matching Pogačar's peak. Transfer to new team may reset dynamics.
